title: Monolith vs microservices
content: Monoliths are simpler to develop and deploy in small teams. Microservices improve isolation and independent scaling but add operational complexity.

title: FastAPI for small AI products
content: FastAPI is often a strong choice for small AI products because it provides fast development, type hints, validation, and simple API design.

title: When to use multiple agents
content: Multi-agent workflows are useful when tasks require decomposition, separate responsibilities, review loops, or structured multi-step decision-making.

title: Reviewer loop value
content: A reviewer loop can improve answer quality by detecting missing structure, weak reasoning, or incomplete trade-off analysis before final output.

title: Decision memo structure
content: A strong decision memo usually contains problem statement, options, pros and cons, risks, and a final recommendation.
